synopsis: As the Old Republic falls, Jedi Master Yoda heads into exile and confusion. Yoda travels on his escape pod to the planet Dagobah but instead lands in the middle of an Imperial fleet. He is spotted by the bridge crew of an Imperial Star Destroyer, who demand his clearance code. Yoda fails to fool them and instead ploughs his escape pod through the Star Destroyer's bridge, sweeping two stormtroopers
title: Into Exile
